LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER CRAIG REEDER'S MOTION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE IS CONTINUED FROM JULY 29, 2015 TO AUGUST 7, 2015. IT DOES NOT APPEAR THAT DEPT. 302 RECEIVED A COURTESY COPY OF THE ADMINISTRATIVE RECORD. DEPT. 302 IS IN RECEIPT OF DOCUMENTS BATES-LABELED REEDER-90001 - REEDER-90043, FILED WITH PETITIONER'S MOVING PAPERS. HOWEVER, RESPONDENT REFERS TO AN ADMINISTRATIVE RECORD IN ITS OPPOSITION WHEREBY THE PAGES ARE NUMBERED "AR." DEPT. 302 IS NOT IN RECEIPT OF THOSE DOCUMENTS. PETITIONER MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE ADMINISTRATIVE RECORD TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN JULY 29, 2015 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; NOT REPORTED. =302/EG
MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-07-2015 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-30-2015 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION, 302, PETITIONER CRAIG REEDER'S MOTION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE IS DENIED. RESPONDENT CORRECTLY DETERMINED THAT PETITIONER WAS NOT QUALIFIED TO RECEIVE A PENSION. THE RECORD SUPPORTS RESPONDENT'S CONCLUSION THAT PETITIONER DID NOT MEET THE "HOLDING OUT" REQUIREMENT OF HARBORS AND NAVIGATION CODE SECTION 1164(C)(4). PETITIONER ALSO FAILED TO MEET THE 75 ASSIGNMENTS/YEAR REQUIREMENT OF HARBORS AND NAVIGATION CODE SECTION 1164(C)(5). PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER AND TO COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER : MELANIE GHENO, CSR # 7489 =302/AJR

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Sep-30-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. TAGHI ASTANEHE, TEL. NO. 1-415-771-6174 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
ATTY. JOEL S. JACOBS, DEPUTY ATTORNEY GENERAL, TEL. NO. 1-510-622-2124 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT.

RULING - A R G U E D; PETITIONER CRAIG REEDER's Motion For Writ Of Mandate is Denied. Respondent correctly determined that petitioner was not qualified to receive a pension. The record supports respondent's conclusion that petitioner did not meet the "holding out" requirement of Harbors and Navigation Code Section 1164(c)(4). Petitioner also failed to meet the 75 assignments/year requirement of Harbors and Navigation Code Section 1164(c)(5).
Prevailing party to prepare a form of order and to comply with CRC 3.1312. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/ajr

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Aug-07-2015 Continued To Sep-30-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER CRAIG REEDER's Motion For Writ Of Mandate is continued to September 30, 2015, at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302, per agreement of the parties.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Jul-29-2015 Continued To Aug-07-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONER CRAIG REEDER'S Motion For Writ Of Mandate is continued to August 7, 2015. It does not appear that Dept. 302 received a courtesy copy of the administrative record. Dept. 302 is in receipt of documents bates-labeled Reeder-90001 - Reeder-90043, filed with Petitioner's moving papers. However, Respondent refers to an administrative record in its opposition whereby the pages are numbered "AR." Dept. 302 is not in receipt of those documents. Petitioner must deliver courtesy copies of the administrative record to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than July 29, 2015 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/eg

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Jun-10-2015 Continued To Jul-29-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Jun-02-2015 Continued To Jul-06-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER CRAIG REEDER'S Motion For Writ Of Mandate is continued to July 6, 2015 to give opposing party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Opposing party must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than June 2, 2015 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be granted. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the moving papers. Judge Harold Kahn; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/HK)
